The '''Rebel SpecForce Armor''' was a model of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], especially by [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel Special Forces]].

==Description==
The Rebel SpecForce Armor was a versatile armor that could be used as an [[Environment suit/Legends|enviro-suit]]<ref name="R:SV" /> as well as a body armor.<ref name="SWG:GU10" /> A form-fitting armor, it prioritized movement and flexibility, and offered a high degree of protection against kinetic and energy based weapons.<ref name="RECG"/> The complete armor set included a [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]], a chest plate, left & right biceps, left & right bracers, gloves, an utility belt, leggings and boots.<ref name="SWG:GU10" /> The design of the helmet was similar to that of [[Clone trooper armor/Legends|clone trooper armor]], the [[Clone paratrooper/Legends|clone paratrooper]] variant in particular.<ref name="RotS">{{Film|III}}</ref> The armor could also be equipped with a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] used to propel its wearer through vacuum of space.<ref name="R:SV" />

==History==
Rebel SpecForce Armor were developed for elite soldiers of the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]].<ref name="SWG:GU10" /> It was the primary armor of the [[Marines (SpecForce)|SpecForce Marines]]<ref name="RECG">''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]''</ref> but it was also worn by other SpecForce troops during operations on planet surfaces,<ref name="SWG:GU10" /> including by [[Infiltrators/Legends|infiltrators]]<ref name="SWGTCG">{{SWGTCG|set=The Shadow Syndicate|cardname=Wraith Op}}</ref> and [[Rebel Honor Guard/Legends|Honor Guards]].<ref name="SWG:ED">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=event|Empire Day}}</ref>
[[File:RebelSpecForce1.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Marines (SpecForce)|SpecForce Marines]] wearing Rebel SpecForce Armors during the boarding of an Imperial starship.]]

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Rebel SpecForce Armors were were worn by [[Able]] and his troops when they [[Raid on an Imperial cargo convoy|boarded]] and hijacked an [[Imperial cargo ship]]. When they rescued [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]] from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] space station, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Deena Shan]] also wore this armor, though without the helmets.<ref name="R:MBME" /> A short time later, Luke Skywalker, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], Deena Shan and [[Able]] used this suit to [[Attack on Bannistar Station|infiltrate]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] refueling [[Space station/Legends|station]] [[Bannistar Station]] from space.<ref name="R:SV" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the armor was worn by SpecForce troopers who participated in the [[Invasion of Bestine|Invasions of Bestine]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Invasion of Dearic|Dearic]] on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] and [[Invasion of Keren|Keren]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="SWG:GU15">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|Game Update 15: Galactic Civil War: Forces Under Siege}}</ref> In the meantime, [[Staff Sergeant/Legends|Staff Sergeant]] [[Levardio]] stationed at the [[Zephyr Base]] on [[Rori/Legends|Rori]] provided Rebel SpecForce Armors to veteran Rebel combatants.<ref name="SWG:GU10" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Rebel SpecForce Armor first appeared in the [[Star Wars: Rebellion (comic series)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'' comic series]].<ref name="R:MBME" /> It later appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:GU10" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Rebel SpecForce Armor was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Game Update 10|Game Update 10]]," released on [[June 2]], [[2009]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Star Wars Galaxies: Game Update 10">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=927421|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Game Update 10}}</ref>

In ''Star Wars Galaxies'', the Rebel SpecForce Armor was the Rebel counterpart of the [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]] armor. It could be obtained by purchasing it with PvP "[[W:c:swg:Battlefield|Battlefield]] Tokens" from [[W:c:swg:Staff Sergeant Levardio|Staff Sergeant Levardio]] at the [[W:c:swg:Rori Rebel Outpost|Rebel Outpost]] on [[W:c:swg:Rori|Rori]]. A battle-worn version that was wearable by non-Humans could be purchased from [[W:c:swg:Rebel recruiter|Rebel recruiters]] with "[[W:c:swg:Galactic Civil War Token|Galactic Civil War Tokens]]."<ref name="SWG:GU10" />
